free_text: Formation of light isotopes by protons and deuterons
of 3.65 GeV/nucleon on separated tin isotopes.
Metallic foils, three layers of them for 118,120,124Sn
The values quoted in table 1 and table 2 as
the errors in the respective quantities were obtained
as the largest deviation of the results of various
measurements from the averaged cross section value.
There errors include statistical uncertainties in
determining the detector efficiencies, the numbers of
particles in a beam and the number of nuclei in a
The uncertainty in monitor cross section.
